tweets.text:
Simplest way to get better AI output: 
Use an RTF prompt.
 1. Role
2. Task
3. Format 

Give it a job title, tell it what to do, tell it how to format the output. This alone will improve everything you get from any LLM.

"Your role is copywriter, your task is to write an article,
